**Subject Line:**  
**Important: Verify Your Account Details to Prevent Unauthorized Access**

**Email Body:**

Dear [Customer Name],

We are writing to inform you that we have detected unusual activity on your account. To ensure the security of your personal and financial information, we kindly ask you to verify your account details.

**Please click the link below to confirm your information:**

[Verify Account Details](https://secure-bank-verification.com)

If you did not initiate this request, please contact our customer support team immediately at [customer-support@bank.com](mailto:customer-support@bank.com) or call us at [1-800-555-1234].

For your safety, we recommend:
- Never sharing your login credentials with anyone
- Using strong, unique passwords for all your accounts
- Monitoring your account activity regularly

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter. We value your trust and are committed to protecting your financial security.

Sincerely,  
[Bank Name] Customer Support Team

---

3. **Contact the bank directly** using a phone number or website you know is legitimate.
4. **Report the email** to the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) at [ReportFraud.ftc.gov](https://reportfraud.ftc.gov) or your local cybercrime unit.
